arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale set for unwanted Arsenal reunion as transfer update given
arts.sum: Kicking off at 4pm on Sunday, May 25, the fixture is unlikely to affect the Premier League table with Liverpool boasting an 11 point gap to Arsenal in second - although it is highly likely Ramsdale will not have wanted to be facing his former club with relegation confirmed when he departed last year. Raya established himself as Arteta's number one, with Ramsdale keen on first team football and joined Southampton in a deal that included survival bonuses, which the Gunners will now miss out on.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could genuinely beat Real Madrid by exploiting one major Carlo Ancelotti weakness - opinion
arts.sum: Arsenal can expose Real Madrid unlike no other team in the world 🤯

arts.ttl: Arteta: Tie against Real Madrid is my biggest night in management
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is preparing for the biggest night of his managerial career so far as his Arsenal side head into a mouthwatering UEFA Champions League quarter-final against the competition's most successful club, Real Madrid. Like his manager, Bukayo Saka also considers the Real Madrid match to be the biggest of his club career - "I think in an Arsenal shirt, it probably will be, yes" - and is excited by the trappings of Champions League success, including the chance to win the Ballon d'Or.

arts.ttl: Birmingham-born Jude Bellingham dons his best Peaky Blinders outfit as Real Madrid land at Gatwick before heading to their hotel to prepare for Champions League clash with Arsenal
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham paid tribute to his Birmingham roots in style on Monday as he stepped off a plane at Gatwick Airport wearing an outfit straight out of Peaky Blinders.

arts.ttl: Steve McManaman says £39m player Liverpool want to sign is even better than Bukayo Saka
Arsenal's Arteta sees 'joy' in facing Champions League masters Real Madrid and Ancelotti
arts.sum: In just his second season leading a team in the competition, Arteta pits his wits Tuesday in the first leg of the quarterfinals against Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti who is in his 22nd Champions League campaign and has a record five titles. Arsenal coach Mikel Arteta is relishing what he called Monday the biggest game of his coaching career hosting Real Madrid in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham risks fresh Real Madrid suspension ahead of Arsenal Champions League showdown
arts.sum: "Decision: The CEDB has decided: To fine Real Madrid CF player, Antonio Rüdiger, €40,000 and to suspend him for a total of one (1) UEFA club competition match for which he would be otherwise eligible for violating the basic rules of decent conduct. "To fine Real Madrid CF player, Kylian Mbappé, €30,000 and to suspend him for a total of one (1) UEFA club competition match for which he would be otherwise eligible for violating the basic rules of decent conduct.

arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news as Mikel Arteta makes fresh Bukayo Saka admission for Real Madrid tie
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has provided a fresh update on the fitness of Bukayo Saka and the rest of his Arsenal squad ahead of Tuesday's Champions League quarter-final first leg against Real Madrid at Emirates Stadium. With all of that being said, Arteta was able to provide a positive injury update as no fresh concerns have emerged before their home clash against the European champions.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal and Liverpool are still contenders to sign £87m attacker who Man City love
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool cannot be discounted from the race to sign Bayern Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz, TBR Football can exclusively reveal. Manchester City are pushing...

arts.ttl: Nico Williams buys luxury villa in major Arsenal transfer hint
arts.sum: Nico Williams has caused a stir with his purchase of a luxury villa in Marbella. Last summer, Williams was Barcelona's top target, so his purchase of a new home in Spain could be a hint that he is planning to remain in LaLiga.
